user_query: I'm planning a company team-building activity and I want to include gaming. Can you recommend some multiplayer games and provide the cheapest deals for each game? Additionally, please let me know if there are any free games available on Epic Games this week.

TaskList.description: Research and recommend popular multiplayer games suitable for team-building activities.
Find the cheapest deals for each recommended game from various retailers.
Check the Epic Games store for any free games available this week.
